title: helianthus perennis
intro: Helianthus perennis, also known as the woodland sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helianthus perennis include its potential to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
